title: Best Credly Alternatives for Badging
seo_title: Best Credly Alternatives for Badging in 2026 (Compared)
seo_description: Looking for a Credly alternative? Compare the best digital badging platforms — CredSure, Accredible, BadgeCert, Credentify and Badgr — by features and fit.
content_html:
Unlocking new opportunities and showcasing your skills has never been more critical than in today’s competitive world. Credly is a leading digital credentialing that allows organisations and individuals to issue and manage their digital badges and credentials. However, it’s always wise to explore alternative options in the rapidly evolving landscape of online credentialing. This article presents the top alternatives to Credly for managing and issuing digital badges. As experts in digital badging, we have conducted extensive research and analysis to identify the best platforms available. Here’s what we will take you through in this blog: Credly Alternative: CredSure Credly Alternative: Accredible Credly Alternative: BadgeCert Credly Alternative: Credentify Credly Alternative: Badgr CredSure vs Credly – Detailed Comparison Whether you are an educational institution, a professional organisation, or a company looking to streamline your credentialing process, these alternatives offer robust features and capabilities to meet your needs. Let’s explore the top Credly alternatives and their unique offerings.

Credly Alternative: CredSure

The best Credly alternative is CredSure, a cutting-edge digital credentialing platform that revolutionises how individuals and organisations manage and verify credentials. Built on blockchain technology, CredSure offers a secure and transparent digital credentialing solution for storing, issuing, and verifying digital badges. The platform offers a wide range of services to streamline credentialing and enhance trust in digital identities. Here are some of the critical features of the CredSure platform: Secure Digital Wallet: CredSure offers a secure digital wallet where individuals can store their digital credentials. These credentials can include educational degrees, certifications, licenses, employment history, and other relevant documents. The wallet is encrypted and protected by advanced security measures to ensure the privacy and integrity of the stored credentials. Issuance and Verification: CredSure allows organisations, such as educational institutions, professional bodies, and employers, to issue digital badges directly to individuals. These badges are cryptographically secured and tamper-proof, ensuring their authenticity. Moreover, CredSure provides a simple and efficient verification process, enabling third parties to verify the validity of the badges instantly. Portable and Interoperable: One of the critical advantages of CredSure is its portability and interoperability. Individuals can easily share their digital credentials with employers, educational institutions, or other relevant parties with just a few clicks. The platform supports open standards and protocols, ensuring compatibility with other credentialing systems, promoting data exchange, and reducing redundancy in the credentialing process. Fraud Prevention: CredSure’s blockchain technology ensures the immutability and integrity of digital credentials, making it extremely difficult for fraudsters to manipulate or counterfeit them. The decentralised nature of blockchain adds a layer of security, making it highly resistant to hacking or data breaches. Analytics and Insights: CredSure’s best credentialing software provides analytics and insights to individuals and organisations, offering valuable data on credential usage, validation trends, and skill gaps. This information can be used for talent acquisition, workforce planning, and personal development. LMS Integration: CredSure allows you to seamlessly integrate digital certificates and badges with multiple applications, including Zapier. With LMS integration, your organisation can easily automate the issuance of certificates and badges. The integration allows for seamless data flow and synchronisation between different platforms, eliminating the need for manual data entry and saving time and effort for both educators and learners.

Credly Alternative: Accredible

Accredible is a versatile credentialing platform trusted by numerous institutions and organisations worldwide. It enables you to design and issue professional digital badges and certificates with customisable templates. Accredible offers advanced features such as integrated recipient verification, expiration dates, and the ability to embed rich media, making your credentials stand out. The platform also provides robust API integrations and supports automation for seamless workflows.

Credly Alternative: BadgeCert

BadgeCert is a leading digital credentialing platform that empowers individuals and organisations with secure and portable digital badges. It offers a range of features, including badge creation, management, and verification. BadgeCert’s innovative features, such as its Open Badge Passport, allow individuals to showcase their achievements and skills in a visually appealing and easily shareable format. The platform also supports custom badge designs and offers enterprise-level solutions for large-scale credentialing initiatives.

Credly Alternative: Credentify

Credentify is a comprehensive digital credentialing platform that provides end-to-end solutions for creating, managing, and sharing digital badges and certificates. It offers a user-friendly interface, allowing organisations to design visually appealing credentials with customisable templates. Credentify also provides advanced features like blockchain-based verification, ensuring the authenticity and integrity of your credentials. The platform integrates with popular learning management systems (LMS), offering seamless badge issuance and verification workflows.

Credly Alternative: Badgr

Badgr is an open-source digital credentialing platform offering various features to create, issue, and manage digital badges. Developed by Concentric Sky, Badgr provides a user-friendly interface and supports integration with multiple learning platforms and systems. It offers a centralised repository for storing and managing credentials, making sharing and showcasing achievements easy. Badgr also supports the Open Badges standard, enabling interoperability with other platforms and systems.

CredSure vs Credly: A Detailed Comparison

To help you make an informed decision, let’s compare Credly and CredSure, two popular digital credentialing platforms. In the table below, we will explore some key features offered by three digital credentialing platforms — CredSure, Credly, and Accredible.

Comparison of Best Credly Alternatives

We have explored the best Credly alternatives that can help you streamline your badging process and enhance the value of your digital badges. Whether you prioritise customisation, security, or integration capabilities, these platforms offer a range of features to meet your unique requirements. You can evaluate their offerings, compare their strengths, and select the best platform with your organisation’s goals and objectives. Remember, choosing the right digital badging platform is a critical decision that can significantly impact your organisation’s reputation and the value of your credentials. Frequently asked questions

What is the best Credly alternative?

For organisations that want secure, blockchain-verified credentials with bulk issuance and instant verification, CredSure is the strongest Credly alternative. Accredible, BadgeCert, Credentify, and Badgr are also worth comparing depending on your priorities.

Is there a free Credly alternative?

Several platforms offer free tiers or trials for a small number of badges. For ongoing or bulk issuing with verification, branding, and integrations, a paid plan is usually required — compare the platforms above on the features you need.

Why switch from Credly?

Common reasons include cost, the need for blockchain-backed verification, white-label branding, LMS/HR integrations, or more flexible bulk issuance.

What should I look for in a Credly alternative?

Standards support (Open Badges, verifiable credentials), the verification experience, bulk issuance, branding, integrations, analytics, and pricing at your volume.
